title: Problem Brief: PM operating rhythm automation
problem_summary: Product managers on B2B product teams lose high-value time because recurring status and coordination outputs must be manually reconstructed across fragmented sources.
strategic_fit_summary: This problem fits a challenger posture because it lets ProductOS win on trusted PM workflow continuity rather than broad platform breadth.
why_this_problem_now: AI is accelerating drafting, which makes the remaining reconstruction and trust gap more visible and expensive.
why_this_problem_for_this_segment: B2B product teams feel recurring coordination drag often enough to adopt a PM-specific operating layer before considering broader workflow replacement.

problem_severity.severity_rationale: The pain recurs across weekly operating cycles and directly slows decision, status, and handoff work.

evidence_refs.justification: Leadership review highlighted repeated PM overhead around status reconstruction.
Prototype showed a viable path when state quality is sufficient.

prioritization.priority_rationale: This is the clearest near-term problem that can prove ProductOS value through better PM output quality and safer downstream automation.
prioritization.reviewer_handoff: PM should confirm the framing is complete enough to support PRD and story generation without reopening raw research.

handoff_readiness_summary: The problem brief is grounded in evidence, persona truth, and explicit upstream artifacts, so downstream execution can treat it as decision-ready.
